title: aster odoratus
intro: Aster odoratus, also known as Fragrant Aster or Calico Aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Aster odoratus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Aster odoratus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as salves and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
